progress_summary: Gate for the Option C v3 live port into site/src/pages/changelog.astro (2-tab layout; roadmap folded out of the now-deleted RoadmapTimeline.astro; real /api/votes wiring; deep-link + ARIA tabs). Changed: changelog.astro, RoadmapForm.astro (comment), changelog-and-scenarios.spec.ts (rewritten for the new DOM), RoadmapTimeline.astro (deleted). PASS — ran the real suite this time: `astro check` 0 errors, `astro build` 35 pages OK, `vitest run` 345/345 passing, anti-pattern + secret scan clean. The Playwright browser run is deferred to CI (chromium CDN blocked in this sandbox); the e2e specs were validated statically against the built dist/changelog/index.html — all asserted hooks present (2 tabs, panels, 6 data-vote-target ids OPC-150/160/161/162/170/171, #v1-4 /coverage link, hidden coming panel).
next_actions: PR #265 updated with the live changelog port; CI runs Playwright e2e + Lighthouse/Axe — watch for the changelog e2e + a11y budget.
On approval + merge to main, deploy is manual: npm run deploy:staging, eyeball staging.opchain.dev/changelog, then npm run deploy.
